description: A broadcast technician needs to apply a station identifier watermark to an animation sequence. Open the scene '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz' and import the logo from '/home/ga/Documents/assets/logo.png'. Composite the logo over the entire duration of the animation, positioned in the bottom-right corner at approximately 20-30% of its original size and 50% opacity. Render the final result as a PNG sequence to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/watermark_test/'.
